# Automation Builders

> An Australian, founder-led AI workflow automation studio. We give 20–500-person teams back 20+ hours a week by building, deploying, and maintaining custom automations across the tools they already use. Ongoing Automation Care is included at the industry-standard 15% of build per year — the same model top enterprise vendors charge for support contracts.

## Product
- [Homepage and ROI Calculator](https://automationbuilders.ai/): Interactive calculator that turns a team's manual processes into a 3-year cost-of-inaction number; the authoritative entry point to what we do, how we price, and how to book.
- [What we build](https://automationbuilders.ai/#agents): Three categories of automation — revenue-side (CRM, lead routing), operations (onboarding, support, reporting), and back-office (invoicing, recruitment, reconciliation) — with sample processes you can drop into the calculator.
- [How it works](https://automationbuilders.ai/#process): The three-stage engagement — Day 0 discovery call, Day 2–5 fixed-scope Automation Assessment, Day 14–30 first automation live.

## Company
- [About Automation Builders](https://automationbuilders.ai/#trust): Founded and personally signed off on by Noah Webb. Australian team, same-timezone delivery, one accountable point of contact per engagement.
- [FAQ](https://automationbuilders.ai/#faq): Authoritative answers on SLA, IP ownership, data security, exit terms, and how the build is priced — the questions CEOs actually ask before they buy.
- [Book a discovery call](https://calendly.com/noah-automationbuilders/30min): 30-minute call that maps the top three manual processes by ROI and produces a fixed-scope Automation Assessment.

## Legal
- [Privacy Policy](https://automationbuilders.ai/privacy-policy.html): How we collect, store, and use customer and prospect data.
- [Terms of Service](https://automationbuilders.ai/terms-of-service.html): Engagement, payment, IP, and exit terms for every Automation Builders build.

## Optional
- [Email support](mailto:support@automationbuilders.ai): Direct support inbox for clients on Automation Care.
